_comment: This file is the Power's per-install MCP config; Kiro copies it into ~/.kiro/powers/installed/outsystems/mcp.json on auto-install. The URL below is a sentinel; the agent (Kiro Chat) detects it on first use, asks the user for their tenant hostname, and patches both this file and ~/.kiro/settings/mcp.json (powers.mcpServers['power-outsystems-outsystems'].url). See ./POWER.md and ./steering/skill.md for the recipe.
